snippets.title: List comprehension vs loop
snippets.code:
# verbose
squares = []
for n in range(5):
    squares.append(n * n)

# pythonic
squares = [n * n for n in range(5)]
snippets.explanation: Comprehensions are shorter and usually faster.

snippets.title: Dict iteration
snippets.explanation: .items() yields key/value pairs for clean iteration.
